narration: Carbon capture is how we trap CO2 emissions from the air or production processes.

narration: There are two main types: direct air capture and point source capture.
visual_description: Escalation visual: There are two main types: direct air capture and point source capture.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: There are two main types: direct air capture and point source capture.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: There are two main types: direct air capture and point source capture.

narration: Direct air capture pulls CO2 directly from the atmosphere, while point source captures it from emission sources like factories.
